title: Fuel for Health Workers every Friday – Minister
body_lines: COLOMBO (News 1st); Minister of Health Keheliya Rambukwella said that following a discussion with the Minister of Power and Energy Kanchana Wijesekara an allowance of fuel has been allocated exclusively for eligible health care workers every Friday.
This will greatly aid essential service workers in the execution of their duties, he said.
Hasitha Samantha alias ‘Sarpaya’ acquitted and released from double murder case
